findings.Problem: Warning check uses exact string equality after TrimSpace, so a trailing slash on --cloud-endpoint bypasses the placeholder warning and triggers a redirect-block failure
findings.Fix: Use strings.TrimRight(endpoint, "/") or url.Parse to normalize before comparison

findings.Problem: TestExitCode does not test authError wrapping a usageError
findings.Fix: Add test case: {"auth error wrapping usage error", authError(usageError(errors.New("bad"))), 3}
findings.Evidence: authError(usageError(...)) should yield 3, not 2 — auth rejection must override exit-2 per AC 04-04 EC2
